StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.label: 选中
StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.description: pawn 被玩家选中时触发

StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.label: 移动指令
StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.description: 征召状态下玩家下达移动指令时触发

StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.label: 攻击指令
StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.description: 征召状态下玩家下达攻击指令时触发

StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.label: 连点彩蛋
StellarisDaughter.VoiceEventDef.description: 快速连续点击 pawn 超过阈值时触发
